title: EU increases support to contain Ebola outbreak
content: Commissioner for crisis management Hadja Lahbib has announced €16.5 million in additional EU support to stop the Ebola outbreak.
snippet: Commissioner for crisis management Hadja Lahbib has announced €16.5 million in additional EU support to stop the Ebola outbreak.
sourceTitle: European Civil Protection and Humanitarian Aid Operations
